title: Genesis 0X
wikitext: []: Genesis 0:X             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Thu Sep 29, 2005 12:21 pm I'm looking for info on which episodes each Genesis 0:X volume originally (when released in video in Japan) brought. I've been browsing the web, but have been getting different results. For once I know there were up to Genesis 0:14, the last 4 of them containing the NPC episodes. Many sites I've been browsing call for 7 or 8 volumes, and some 13 (2 eps per volume). So, if anyone could put a list on the original Genesis 0:X and their respective episodes, I'd be grateful.

Article: Genesis 0X
[]: Genesis 0:X             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Thu Sep 29, 2005 12:21 pm I'm looking for info on which episodes each Genesis 0:X volume originally (when released in video in Japan) brought. I've been browsing the web, but have been getting different results. For once I know there were up to Genesis 0:14, the last 4 of them containing the NPC episodes. Many sites I've been browsing call for 7 or 8 volumes, and some 13 (2 eps per volume). So, if anyone could put a list on the original Genesis 0:X and their respective episodes, I'd be grateful.
